creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Mon Nov  4 20:59:58 2013
New Revision: 332783
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332783

Log:
  www/deforaos-surfer: allow staging
  
  - Allow staging
  - Convert lib depends to new format
  - USES desktop-file-utils
  
  PR:		ports/183642
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/www/deforaos-surfer/Makefile
  head/www/deforaos-surfer/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/deforaos-surfer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/deforaos-surfer/Makefile	Mon Nov  4 20:56:58 2013	(r332782)
+++ head/www/deforaos-surfer/Makefile	Mon Nov  4 20:59:58 2013	(r332783)
@@ -3,10 +3,11 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	surfer
 PORTVERSION=	0.2.6
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.defora.org/os/download/download/3709/
-DISTNAME=	Surfer-${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	deforaos-
+DISTNAME=	Surfer-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	olivier@cochard.me
 COMMENT=	DeforaOS desktop web browser
@@ -15,20 +16,17 @@ LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	xsltproc:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxslt \
 		${LOCALBASE}/share/xsl/docbook/manpages/docbook.xsl:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/docbook-xsl
-LIB_DEPENDS=	System:${PORTSDIR}/devel/deforaos-libsystem \
-		Desktop:${PORTSDIR}/x11/deforaos-libdesktop \
-		gnet-2.0:${PORTSDIR}/net/gnet2 \
-		webkitgtk-1.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/webkit-gtk2
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libSystem.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/deforaos-libsystem \
+		libDesktop.so:${PORTSDIR}/x11/deforaos-libdesktop \
+		libgnet-2.0.so:${PORTSDIR}/net/gnet2 \
+		libwebkitgtk-1.0.so:${PORTSDIR}/www/webkit-gtk2
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/share/certs/ca-root-nss.crt:${PORTSDIR}/security/ca_root_nss
 
-MAKE_ARGS=	PREFIX=${PREFIX}
-USE_GNOME=	gtk20 desktopfileutils
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20
 USES=		pkgconfig gettext
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 
-MAKE_ENV+=	MANDIR=${MANPREFIX}/man
-
-MAN1=		download.1 helper.1 surfer.1
+MAKE_ARGS=	PREFIX=${PREFIX}
+MAKE_ENV+=	MANDIR=${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/deforaos-surfer/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/deforaos-surfer/pkg-plist	Mon Nov  4 20:56:58 2013	(r332782)
+++ head/www/deforaos-surfer/pkg-plist	Mon Nov  4 20:59:58 2013	(r332783)
@@ -1,6 +1,9 @@
 bin/download
 bin/surfer
 bin/helper
+man/man1/download.1.gz
+man/man1/helper.1.gz
+man/man1/surfer.1.gz
 share/applications/surfer.desktop
 share/applications/helper.desktop
 share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/surfer-view-html-source.png
@@ -9,3 +12,9 @@ share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/Surfer.mo
 share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/Surfer.mo
 share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/Surfer.mo
 share/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES/Surfer.mo
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/24x24/apps
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/24x24
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/16x16
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor
+@dirrmtry share/icons
